title: pronephrium glandulosum
intro: Pronephrium glandulosum is a type of fern native to the tropical regions of Asia, specifically found in countries like India and Sri Lanka. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Pronephrium glandulosum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and improving digestion, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts or tinctures, which can be administered orally or used topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
